ModMetaData.name: GTI Weapon Wear
ModMetaData.author: WarezCrawler
ModMetaData.description:
GTI Weapon Wear (work in progress).
Scaffolding build: combines a small C# assembly with XML and Harmony patches. For now it only tags weapons with a "GTI ranged weapon" / "GTI melee weapon" line (in the Max Hit Points stat breakdown and on the weapon's inspect panel), to verify the build and load pipeline. The actual weapon-degradation-on-use mechanic comes later.
Requires Harmony. Safe to add to or remove from a save.
